collapse_decision: Collapsed as DRIFT. Treat the citation as concept-preserving only if reviewer accepts the facet extraction and the listed mismatches are resolved.

method: BTA concept-equivalence beam pattern: extracted facets, ordered Closure-SDK S3 composition, per-facet mismatch receipts, collapse status.
warnings: Closure geometry is a receipt over structured extraction, not an oracle over raw paper meaning.
CLOSED requires reviewer acceptance of the extracted facets, not only a low sigma score.
